name: Joe Froggers
recipeInstructions:
Stir together flour, ground ginger, ground cloves, ground nutmeg, ground allspice, and 1 1/2 teaspoons salt. Mix rum and 1/3 cup water.
Combine molasses and baking soda. Cream sugar and butter; add half the dry ingredients and half the liquid mixture, then half the molasses mixture, blending well after each addition. Repeat with remaining ingredients. Chill dough for several hours or overnight.
On a well-floured surface, roll dough 1/4 inch thick; cut with a 4-inch cutter or 1-pound coffee can. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes. (Watch carefully so cookies don't burn.) Let stand a few minutes; then remove from the cookie sheet.
